title: Bulk Turkey Chili
description: A hearty, high-protein turkey chili designed for batch cooking, easy storage, and reuse across multiple meals.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and bell peppers, cook until softened.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add ground turkey and cook until browned, breaking it apart.
Season with salt, pepper, chili powder, and cumin.
Stir in diced tomatoes, tomato sauce, and beans.
Let cool slightly and portion into containers.

storage.reheat_instructions: Reheat on stovetop or microwave until hot, adding a splash of water if needed.

batch_notes: Cook entire pot at once and divide into portions.
Flavor improves after sitting, making it ideal for multi-day meals.
meal_variations: Use as filling for wraps or burritos
Serve over rice for added carbs
